name: Fiesta Sangria
recipeIngredient: Fresh seasonal fruits such as seedless grapes, apple slices, pear slices
1 gallon Dry red or white wine
2 bunches Long-stemmed lemon verbena (mint and lemon balm may be added)
recipeInstructions:
Place oranges, lemon, lime, and other seasonal fruits in a large container. Add wine, orange liqueur, brandy, and herbs. Cover and refrigerate at least overnight, or up to three days.
Fill a clear glass pitcher with sangria, adding more freshly sliced seasonal fruits, frozen peaches and/or blueberries and fresh long-stemmed herbs. (Soft fruits such as fresh strawberries or sliced kiwi may also be added before serving.) Pour into wine glasses with a splash of club soda or champagne, a small cluster of grapes, and a fresh herb sprig.
Makes about 40 servings of 4 ounces each. NOTE: If red wine is used in the punch, add a long stick of cinnamon.
